headline: Farther Raises $72M Series C Led by CapitalG and Viewpoint Ventures to Expand AI-Driven Wealth Platform
summary: Farther, a technology-driven wealth management firm, has secured $72 million in a Series C funding round led by CapitalG and Viewpoint Ventures. The capital is intended to continue the company's efforts to revolutionize wealth management through its technology platform. The round signals continued investor confidence in AI-native approaches to financial advisory services.

key_stat.label: Series C funding raised in USD
